name: Tiles master
author: Poki
description: Tiles Master is a tile-based merge game where your goal is to match and merge 3 identical tiles! Facing a vertical puzzle, you can only select tiles from the top layer, adding an extra layer of strategy. With limited space to hold selected tiles, you must carefully merge them before running out of room. Solve challenging puzzles, use power-ups, and enjoy the addictive gameplay. Do you have what it takes to become the ultimate tile master? How to play Tiles master? Click to select a tile. Who created Tiles master? Tiles master is created by Tuki Tuki Games. Play their other games on Poki: Drilly The Miner and Pack a bag ! How can I play Tiles master for free? You can play Tiles master for free on Poki. Can I play Tiles master on mobile devices and desktop? Tiles master can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
